details: The evidence quote is present and supports compound 4a, but the paper prints the range as "Mp = 174-76°C" while value_raw is recorded as "174-176°C".
The quote is present in article_text.txt and supports Mesuasinone m.p. 118-119 °C as a measured melting point.
The quote is present in article_text.txt and supports compound 8a m.p. 209-213 °C as a measured melting point.
Table 5 is present and supports Hydroxychloroquine literature Tm 367.1 K; the conversion 367.1 - 273.15 = 93.95 °C is correct.

The PDF text contains DOI 10.3762/bjoc.10.317 and the quote supports the value, but source_url is legacy:manifest_178 rather than the DOI URL.
The compound and value are present in the HTML, but the evidence_quote is a tag-stripped readable rendering and is not present in the raw HTML with only whitespace/hyphen normalization.
